description: Draws a vertical dashed line at the expected value E(X) on a PMF or binomial chart. Computes E(X) = sum of x * P(x) and displays the mean as a label.
utility: Show expected value line on a chart

arguments.name: chart
arguments.description: Reference to a PMF or binomial chart

arguments.name: fillColor
arguments.description: Color for the mean line and label (default: red)

examples.expression:
S = sspace(dice(2), at(4,10), view(12,12))
P = pmf(S, sum, at(4,24), view(10,10))
expectedvalue(P, fc(red))

B = binomial(20, 0.3, at(4,10), view(10,10))
expectedvalue(B, fc(red))
